emails.subject: Why your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] may not be what your doctor told you
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you have been dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] and standard tests keep coming back 'normal,' you are not imagining things — and you are not alone.

Here is something most conventional care doesn't have time to explore: many persistent symptoms like yours trace back to upstream imbalances in gut function, hormone regulation, or immune signaling. Standard lab panels often miss these because they are designed to detect disease, not dysfunction.

At Parsley Health, our clinicians are board-certified MDs, DOs, NPs, and PAs trained in both conventional and functional medicine. We run advanced testing, spend real time with you, and build a personalized care plan focused on why symptoms are happening — not just managing them.

[KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] suggests there may be a specific area worth investigating further. We would love to help connect the dots.

When you are ready, [BOOKING_LINK] — we have same-week appointments available.

With care,
The Parsley Health Team

emails.subject: Think of your body like a river — here is what that means for [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM]
emails.preview: The biology behind why symptoms persist.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Imagine your body is a river. When something blocks the source — sediment, a dam, debris upstream — the effects show up far downstream: murky water, reduced flow, struggling ecosystems. Standard care often focuses on treating what is visible at the riverbank. Functional medicine looks upstream.

For conditions like [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM], the 'upstream blockage' is frequently something like chronic inflammation, a disrupted gut microbiome, a hormone imbalance, or a genetic variant affecting how your body processes key nutrients. These are not always visible on standard panels, and they rarely resolve on their own without targeted support.

This is not an alternative to real medicine — it is medicine that asks better questions. Parsley clinicians combine evidence-based functional protocols with the ability to prescribe conventional treatments when appropriate. No tradeoffs.

[RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] may be a strong starting point based on your assessment results.

You can learn more or get started at [BOOKING_LINK].

With care,
The Parsley Health Team

emails.subject: She had 10 years of answers from no one. Then this.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

One of our members — we will call her S. — spent over a decade cycling through specialists for debilitating fatigue, digestive pain, and a low mood she could not shake. Every test came back 'within normal limits.' Every appointment ended with a shrug.

When S. came to Parsley, her clinician ordered a comprehensive functional lab panel. Within weeks, they identified a combination of gut dysbiosis, subclinical thyroid dysfunction, and an MTHFR variant that was affecting her methylation. With a structured care plan — dietary adjustments, targeted supplementation, and ongoing monitoring — her energy started returning within three months. By the end of her first year, she described it as 'getting her life back.'

Results vary and are never guaranteed. But S.'s story reflects what is possible when care goes deeper.

If [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] has been your version of this story, we are here. Same-week appointments are available.

[BOOKING_LINK]

With care,
The Parsley Health Team

app_config.tagline: Root-cause functional medicine that helps you feel better and stay well.

Gut & Digestive Health: Acid reflux or heartburn that keeps coming back
Gas and digestive distress that disrupts daily life
Feeling full quickly or unable to finish meals
Hormone Health: Persistent fatigue not explained by sleep
Unexplained weight gain or difficulty losing weight
Mood swings or irritability around your cycle
Hair thinning or increased hair loss
Acne or skin changes in adulthood
Feeling cold when others are comfortable
Autoimmune & Inflammation: Joint pain or stiffness that comes and goes
Skin rashes or flares without a clear trigger
Swelling or inflammation in the body
Recurring gut issues alongside immune symptoms
Sensitivity to foods, chemicals, or environment
Unexplained Symptoms: Normal test results but you still feel unwell
Symptoms that don't fit a single diagnosis
Headaches that recur without clear cause
Skin reactions or hives with no known trigger
Anxiety or low mood alongside physical symptoms
General sense that something is off
Mental & Emotional Health: Persistent low mood or feelings of flatness
Anxiety that feels out of proportion
Difficulty concentrating at work or home
Agitation or irritability without clear cause
Stress that feels physically felt in the body
Energy & Fatigue: Fatigue that limits exercise or social activity
Reliance on caffeine to function through the day
Low motivation or drive that is new for you
Longevity & Prevention: Want to understand your biological age
Feeling healthy but wanting deeper insight
Looking to reduce inflammation before symptoms appear
Want a personalized plan for the next decade
Weight & Metabolism: Weight gain that started without a clear reason
Difficulty losing weight despite diet and exercise
Sugar cravings that are hard to control
Slow metabolism or low body temperature
Energy tied closely to food intake
